titleStmt.title: SII 39.225: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 225. (A.R. No. 225 of 1916.) SEṄGANMĀL, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. SEṄGANMĀLĪŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA INFRONT OF THE SAME TEMPLE. VĪRAPRATĀPA KṚISHṆAYADĒVA MAHĀRĀYA-ŚAKA 1442 (1520 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of a part of a village separated from Araiyaṉśēri a hamlet of Seṅgaḷunīrpaṭṭu together with lands for worshipping and other sacred services in the temple of Seṅgaṇmalīśvaramuḍaiyār Nāyaṉār at Rājakēśvarinallūr alias Taiyūr in Āyiravēlippaṟṟu a sub-division of Kumiḻi nāḍu, in Āmūr kōṭṭam, under the orders of Sellappar Vi[ra]naraśi[ṁha]rāya Nāyakar, who was the son of Taḻuvakkuḻaindāṉ Bhaṭṭaṉ of Kāñchipuram, who belonged to Agasthiya gōtra. The gift was made for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrī man mahāmaṇṭaleśvaran Irātirāca Irācaparameśvaran pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ koṇṭanāṭu koṭātoṉ pūrvatekṣaṇa paccima Uttara samudrātipati śrī virapratāpa śrī kiṣṇadeva mahārāyar bradhivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa vi
kirama samvatisarattu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu saptamiyum Atta nakṣataramum peṟṟa Ātittavārattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu nakaram kāñcippura Uṭaiyatiruvekampamuṭaiya nayiṉār koyil taṉpi la Akastya gotrattu boyāya nasūtrattu taḻuvakkuḻaintām paṭarakali cellappātasar viranar simharāya nāyakar
Appiṇaippaṭikku kauśika gotrattu boyāya nasutrattu tekṣaṇamuṟtiyār tiyāka piḷḷai kalivu Āmuṟkoṭṭattu kumuḻi nāṭṭu Āyiravelippaṟṟu Irācakecari nallūrāṉa tai Ūril nayiṉār ceṅkaṇ mālicuramuṭaiya nayiṉāṟku kuṭutta dharmmasāsaṉak kaiōlai nammuṭaiyalaiyāṉa ceṅkaḻunir paṭṭuc ciṟa
yil Araiyaṉ ceriyil pirivu melaik kau m kirāmam Oṉṟu kiṣṇayadeva mahārāyaṟku suki tamāka makāsaṅkiṟama puṇyakālattile Utakatārāpūṟuvamāka tiruppaṇikku tāraivāttut tarukaiyil Anta kirāmam Ēṟum kuṭiyu Ēṟṟikkoṇṭu nañcai puñcai nāṟpāṟ kellai yiṟyituvum pūṟuvam paḻaiya Aḷa
m ṉālum puttu Aḷam Āṟum Āka Aḷam pattum paṇṭāra Uppu vilaiyil ṉūṟṟukku yiraṇṭu paṇam Uṟaiyānava mum pūcai tiruppaṇi naṭattakaṭavar Ākavum veṇṭu payir ceyvikkak koṇṭu Annāṟpāṟ kellaiyil Uṭpaṭṭa kiyamiceṣava jalapāṣaṇa A ṇa Āgāmisiddhasāyyama Eṉkiṉṟa Aṣṭabhoka m
svāmiyaṅkaḷuṭaṉe Ācantirāṟka stātiyāka Aṉupavittuk koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum ṉaimattukku yātoruvaṉ Ahitam paṇṇivar Uṇṭāṉāl keṅkai karaiyile kāciviśvanātaṉ saṉṉatiyile vuraikku govacita Eṉkiṉṟa pañcamavipātakam
vaṉakaṅ Inta dhamma Ācantirakkamāka nayiṉār ceṅkaṉ māliśvaramuṭaiya nayiṉārke naṭakka kaṭavatāka bhanavar yoma nāt yo tātu vor ciṟu taṇamuṅ
Digital edition of SII 39.225 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
